title: body ‚Äî Bliss Body, body-coinages, the body as ecosystem
body:
# body ‚Äî Bliss Body, body-coinages, the body as ecosystem

The body is the workshop. Across roughly a decade Colin coins **bodies**
the way he coins animals: by collision and qualification ‚Äî *bliss body*,
*subtle body*, *shiva body*, *diamond body*, *comfort body*, *golden body*,
*manipulative squid bodies in your body*. Where animals belong to
**[[motifs/animal-coinage]]** and water belongs to **[[motifs/water]]**,
the body is the *containing register* underneath both: the ocean that has
the fish in it (`bodyocean`), the room the brain operates from
(*Ecosy(stem) Brain(stem)*), the camera-bristling vessel of *cameras in my
body*.

The motif spans the full arc of the catalog ‚Äî earliest archive folders
(`07_08 [_]`, `comfort body`, `bodyocean`) through the polished Killd By
albums (Recovery's *cameras in my body*, Court Clothes' *_river_inside_*,
the 2016 EP literally titled **draw blood**) ‚Äî and persists past Colin's
own life into the **Bliss Body** memorial event in 2018. The same two-word
title travels: **`bliss body`** appears as alphabets album track (BESTUV09
2009; NOV09 2009), then resurfaces as the title of a 2015 video project
(`_Documentation/_Creative Assets/Images and Video Assets/1 Bliss Body/`),
and finally as the title Laura Conway gave the 2018 tribute show at Black
Cube. **No other motif in this vault is documented carrying a single
phrase across album ‚Üí film ‚Üí memorial.**

## Tracks / coinages (selection)

### Bliss Body ‚Äî the title that travels

The single phrase recurs across three project surfaces and three different
years:

- `alphabets/BESTUV09/15 bliss body.mp3` ‚Äî first surface, 2009.
- `alphabets/NOV09/08 bliss body.mp3` ‚Äî same year, possibly a take or
  reframe.
- `_Documentation/_Creative Assets/Images and Video Assets/1 Bliss Body/`
  ‚Äî 2015 video project; finished files include `Bliss Body FINAL.mp4` and
  `BLISS BODY FINAL 021018.mov`. The `021018` timestamp on the second file
  is February 10, 2018 ‚Äî within days of Colin's death (1 Feb 2018);
  someone (Colin, or family/collaborators in the immediate aftermath)
  appears to have rendered a final cut at that moment. Worth a more
  careful look in a future session when emotional bandwidth is right.
- `[[events/bliss-body-tribute-2018]]` ‚Äî Laura Conway's tribute show at
  Black Cube, 2018. The phrase becomes the title of the memorial.

This is the strongest single piece of evidence in the vault that Colin's
title-coining vocabulary was load-bearing for how the people around him
understood and grieved him. The phrase is *his* (alphabets 2009); it
survives him.

### Body-coinages ‚Äî body + qualifier

The signature pattern: a quality-noun grafts onto "body" to form a
new psychic-physical category.

- `07_08 [_]/comfort body.mp3`
- `07_08 [_]/Subtle Body.m4a`
- `07_08 [_]/05 Golden Body, Glittery Retinas.m4a`
- `07_08 [_]/bodyocean.m4a` ‚Äî the body **as** a body of water; pivots
  directly into [[motifs/water]].
- `NOV09/02 shiva body.mp3` ‚Äî religious-figure body.
- `JANFEB11 PIRATE LIFE/12 diamond body.mp3` ‚Äî mineral body; pairs with
  `gembones/02 gembones.mp3` as the gem-substrate body.
- `cat mouths spring 08/02 manipulative squid bodies in your body.m4a` ‚Äî
  animal-body **inside** the body; recursion of the register.
- `ST2010REJECTS/simbabodyfirstdraft.mp3` ‚Äî Simba (lion / `simba color
  autumn tide`) body; animal-coinage applied to the body coinage.
- `KB/SLOW&CUT/camera body slow cut.mp3` ‚Äî a camera-body, late-era;
  preludes the canonical "cameras in my body" from Recovery.

### Killd By era ‚Äî body lands on polished records

The motif survives the alphabets ‚Üí Killd By transition fully intact:

- `[[releases/killd-by-recovery|Recovery]]` (Sep 2015), track 10:
  **cameras in my body** ‚Äî the canonical Killd By body track. Multiple
  drafts in the archive (`172 RECOVERYWAV/CamerasInMyBody.wav`,
  `CamerasInMyBodyFinaL.wav`, `RcvryDrafts/CAMERAS in MY BODY.aif`,
  `cameras in my body 1xx.aif`); also a `170 Recovery4Burn/10 cameras in my
  body.m4a` that suggests a CD-burn master. It got many takes ‚Äî it
  mattered to him.
- `[[releases/killd-by-recovery|Recovery]]`, track 13: *in the throw*,
  track 15: *out of Your Head* ‚Äî body-as-action and body-as-container,
  flanking the album's late side.
- `[[releases/killd-by-court-clothes|Court Clothes]]` (Sep 2015), track
  13: *_river_inside_* ‚Äî body as interior water (cf. [[motifs/water]]).
- `[[releases/killd-by-draw-blood|draw blood]]` ‚Äî entire 2016 EP titled
  for body fluid. The naming move that says: this whole release is *of*
  the body. Pre-release archive variant: `bandcamp/killd by__NA/NA - draw
  blood.mp3`.
- `killd by - 2014-2016 -Bsides- - 09 rain HuLa.mp3` ‚Äî body-as-dance,
  body-in-weather (overlaps with [[motifs/water]] sub-cluster rain).

### Body parts ‚Äî the inventory

When Colin breaks the body apart, he goes piece by piece ‚Äî bones, blood,
heart, brain, face, mouth, throat, neck, jaw, lung, gut, spine, fingers,
toe-nails, eye, feet ‚Äî and treats each as its own coinage host.

- `gembones/02 gembones.mp3` ‚Äî the eponymous track of an alphabets release
  named for gem-substrate bones.
- `young tribes spring 08/03 Our Bones Must Be the Colors of the Sun.m4a`
  ‚Äî bones as cosmology.
- `NW wierd summer 08/what about the bones_.mp3`
- `@PRILOSAURUS09/07 lullabones heatbath with iguanadon stomps.m4a` ‚Äî
  bones + lullaby in a single coinage; dinosaur stomps as body-rhythm.
- `backpack samples/collar bones.mp3`
- `DDR2_HAUNTED/02 blood spill. sick in tha head.mp3` ‚Äî blood + head.
- `07_08 [_]/13 Bleeding.m4a`, `Bleeding(2).m4a` ‚Äî the verb-state.
- `BESTUV09/16 heart throb blast ups.mp3`, `octobrr09/09 heart throb blast
  ups.mp3` ‚Äî heart as percussive engine.
- `jul_aug_09/07 grandfather zeb rah heart speak.m4a` ‚Äî heart as voice.
- `KB/Unknown Album/lovecanbreakyourheart.mp3` ‚Äî straightest reading of
  the heart in the catalog; fits with the body-as-vulnerable Killd By
  register.
- `BIEBER JERBOA/02 brain waves dance hall.mp3` ‚Äî brain as dance hall;
  the cross-link to [[motifs/water]] (waves) and the
  body-as-ecosystem reading.
- `07_08 [_]/Ecosy(stem) Brain(stem).m4a` ‚Äî explicit body-as-ecosystem
  pun.
- `07_08 [_]/Rooms, Spaces, Dolphins, Whales, Birds, Brainwaves, Joyous.m4a`
  ‚Äî brainwaves alongside whales and dolphins; body and ocean indistinct.
- `BESTUV09/07 cyborg emo wish face wash out.m4a` (also `jul_aug_09/09 ‚Ä¶
  cyborg emo wish face wash out`) ‚Äî face as cyborg surface.
- `timesmileniceface spring_summer 08/05 ghost face stoned dork smile.m4a`
- `pulse stuff fall 08/sur faces.m4a` ‚Äî surfaces / sur-faces pun.
- `07_08 [_]/Balloon Face.m4a`, `05 You Left Your Face.m4a`, `primal face,
  how do you operate_.m4a`
- `ape rell 2010/03 TC eye snakes.mp3`, `moonpower/07 rapid eye
  portals.mp3`, `MAY2011DTE/10 angel eyes DTE.mp3` ‚Äî eyes as portals /
  containers / surfaces.
- `07_08 [_]/hair in my throat.m4a`, `NW wierd summer 08/throat.mp3`
- `2011 [_]/turtle neck.mp3`, `07_08 [_]/neck scents.mp3`,
  `moonpower/03 laugh necks.mp3`
- `09 [_]/lung noise.mp3`
- `09 [_]/new[t] feet legs and jaws pulse.m4a` ‚Äî feet+legs+jaws in one
  coinage; a body-as-newt.
- `NOV09/04 moves bursts insides guts.mp3`, `09 [_]/lust noise guts
  munch.m4a` ‚Äî guts as the verb-target.
- `timesmileniceface spring_summer 08/06 arms and legs.m4a`,
  `07_08 [_]/planet legs.mp3`, `07_08 [_]/03 Lego Skeletal.m4a`
- `07_08 [_]/12 Found a Unicorn's Spine in the Dirt.m4a` ‚Äî body-archaeology.
- `07_08 [_]/08 like a ceremonial thing under one of your toe nails.m4a`
- `07_08 [_]/Lightning(streetlight fingers).m4a`
- `400YEN/02 on air silk tooth.mp3`, `APRIL CO-EDS 2011/06 big poodle
  sharp tooth.mp3`
- `2011 [_]/pool feet.mp3` (also [[motifs/water]]), `SFTWRSYNTHZdec09/05
  feet spots.mp3`
- `07_08 [_]/Flesh Dress.mp3`, `good muscle feels.m4a` ‚Äî flesh and
  muscle as wearable / sensational.

### Sweat ‚Äî body as moisture (cross-link to [[motifs/sweat]])

The sweat motif is its own page; its inclusion here is the **bodily-fluid
register** that links it to *draw blood* and the broader body theme.

- `07_08 [_]/sweat.m4a`, `may10/sweat.mp3` ‚Äî bare-noun versions.
- `07_08 [_]/sweater before luckines.m4a`, `JANFEB09/01 sweater wearing as
  an activity for small objects in the couch.m4a`, `09 [_]/02 wearing
  sweaters at sock hops.m4a` ‚Äî the **sweater** pun: the garment that
  collects the sweat.
- `[[releases/alphabets-sweatbee-dance-mix|SWEAT BEE: DANCE MIX]]` and
  the SWEATBEE roman-numeraled series ‚Äî see [[motifs/sweat]] for the
  full inventory.

### Body in motion ‚Äî dance, shake, bump, pump, hop

The motif overlaps with the still-pending `dance/rave/groove` motif
candidate (Session 13 carry-forward #7). Listing here so future Claude
can decide whether to break it out:

- `MARCH09hopdanceshakebump/20 invicible through the level ups bump.m4a`
  ‚Äî even the **folder name** is a body-action coinage: hop+dance+shake+bump.
- `BIEBER JERBOA/02 brain waves dance hall.mp3` ‚Äî body in dance hall.
- `POW SOUND/04 shakeshakeshakeshakeshake.m4a`, `JANFEB09/15
  5shakeshakeshakeshakeshake.m4a` ‚Äî the body as percussion.
- `LIVE SET BACKUP ROUND1/100BPM_B_PUMPBOUNZE.mp3`, `LIVESET
  ROUGHDRAFTZ/03 200BPM_B_PUMPBOUNZE.mp3`, `2010[_]/05 webbystreets 12_8
  pump.mp3`, `JUNE_MONSTERS_09/06 beach monster wave pump.m4a`,
  `2010[_]/03 160BPM_B_PUMPBOUNCE.mp3` ‚Äî pump as bodily / sonic engine.
- `2010[_]/04 DREAMYBUMPP slowmotion.mp3`, `LIFEBEFORETIMESOUNDTRACK/05
  sounnds 2_animal ghost bumps calls.mp3`

## Reading

Five operations Colin reliably runs on the body:

1. **Body-coinage by qualifier.** *Bliss / subtle / shiva / diamond /
   comfort / golden / camera body.* The two-word formula is the most
   productive: a noun-or-adjective laminates onto "body" and a new psychic
   category appears. The strongest of these (*bliss body*) exits the
   catalog and becomes the title of his memorial.
2. **Body as ecosystem / interior territory.** *Ecosy(stem) Brain(stem),
   bodyocean, _river_inside_, brain waves dance hall, cameras in my body,
   manipulative squid bodies in your body.* The body contains scenes,
   weather, animals, technology. This is the operation that binds the
   body motif to **[[motifs/water]]** (interior fluid) and
   **[[motifs/animal-coinage]]** (interior animals).
3. **Body-part inventory as world-building tool.** Bones become gems;
   bones become cosmology; bones become lullabies. Eyes become portals.
   Feet become spots. Each body part is treated as a discrete coinage
   host ‚Äî the body is not one thing but a kit of parts each capable of
   sustaining its own coinage line.
4. **Bodily-fluid register as Killd By's mature mode.** *draw blood*
   (2016 EP), *cameras in my body* (Recovery 2015), *_river_inside_*
   (Court Clothes 2015), *sweat* (back to alphabets era). The Killd By
   project narrows the broader alphabets body-coinage practice into a
   tighter blood/sweat/water-inside-the-body register. The polish reduces
   the absurdism but keeps the operation.
5. **Body in motion as percussive engine.** *hopdanceshakebump,
   shakeshakeshakeshakeshake, pumpbounze*. The body becomes the
   metronome. Often paired with explicit BPM tags (`100BPM_B_PUMPBOUNZE`,
   `160BPM_B_PUMPBOUNCE`, `200BPM_B_PUMPBOUNZE`) ‚Äî sonic and bodily speed
   are interchangeable.

The unifying logic: **the body is whatever the song needs it to be ‚Äî a
container for water, a workshop for coinages, a percussion section, a
cyborg surface, an inventory of removable parts** ‚Äî and the language for
all of these is the same titling technique that runs the rest of his
catalog.

## Notes for future passes

- **Bliss Body's three-surface persistence** (album track 2009 ‚Üí video
  project 2015 ‚Üí memorial 2018) is one of the most narratively important
  facts in this vault. Worth a dedicated callout on the website's `colin`
  page or as a sidebar to the memorial event entry. The detail that the
  finished video file's render-date (`021018` ‚Üí 2018-02-10) sits days
  after Colin's death is materially significant; treat with care and
  confirm with Dyl before publicly surfacing.
- **`MARCH09hopdanceshakebump` is a folder named in this register** ‚Äî
  Colin organized work *under* body-action coinages, not just titled
  individual tracks that way. Worth checking other folder names for the
  same pattern in a structural pass; it suggests the motif governs work
  organization, not only tracklist titling.
- **draw blood (2016 EP)** is a candidate for its own dedicated release
  page expansion if not already deep ‚Äî it's the densest body-titled work
  on a finished record and the most explicit move the catalog makes into
  the bodily-fluid register.
- **The `cameras in my body` archive trail** (3+ draft files in
  RcvryDrafts plus a CD-burn master) suggests this track was the most
  worked-over piece on Recovery. Worth comparing draft ‚Üí final on a
  release page if a "tracks worked-over the most" angle ever surfaces for
  the website.
- **Cross-motif overlap is dense and intentional**:
  - body √ó water = `bodyocean`, `_river_inside_`, `brain waves`
  - body √ó animal-coinage = `manipulative squid bodies in your body`,
    `simbabodyfirstdraft`, `gembones`
  - body √ó sweat = the entire SWEATBEE series + `sweater wearing` puns
  - body √ó cosmic-ghost = `Subtle Body`, `shiva body`, `Our Bones Must Be
    the Colors of the Sun`, `ghost face stoned dork smile`
  - body √ó dance/rave/groove (motif TBD) = `hopdanceshakebump`,
    `shakeshakeshakeshakeshake`, the BPM_PUMPBOUNZE family
  These overlaps argue that motifs in this vault are best read as
  **co-located registers** rather than disjoint categories ‚Äî a future
  structural pass could surface a motif-overlap diagram for the website.
- **Sub-motifs not yet broken out** that future passes might want:
  - **bones** as its own page (gembones, lullabones, collar bones, "Our
    Bones Must Be the Colors of the Sun", "what about the bones_"),
  - **face / surface** (face is one of the most-coined parts: ghost face,
    primal face, balloon face, sur faces, cyborg emo wish face),
  - **dance/rave/groove** (called out as Session 13 carry-forward #7,
    still open).
